title: Girlfriend of Steel Images
wikitext:
[]: "Girlfriend of Steel" Images             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 18, 2005 3:20 am Well, boys and girls, I've finally played that wonderful piece of heavily interactive entertainment [<-- oozing with sarcasm] known as "Girlfriend of Steel", and I've been able to update and organize my GOS-relevant image files accordingly. I figure I may as well share the wealth. Most of these are screenshots (originally PNGs) I took myself, supplemented by whatever crap in my GOS folder I couldn't get a screeny of. For purposes of practicality, I've converted most of the PNGs into 90% JPEGs; although if you really want the PNGs (which have no compression artifacts, but are helluva bigger), you can nag me on AIM or something. I've broken the games' cut scenes (this "game" is many long cut scenes separated by brief moments of paltry 'interactivity') down into 'cuts' (which make no pretensions of being official), separated into multiple ZIP files: gos_001~039 gos_040~084 gos_085~129 gos_130~181 gos_182~214 gos_215~241 gos_242~265 gos_265~288 There are, like, two numbering errors. By the time I noticed them, tho, I decided I didn't care. Additional ZIPs are: gos_endings : The three possible ending sequences. (Warning: n00dity!) gos_explore : Screenshots from the "exploratory" segments in the game. gos_extra : Random GOS crap from the Collector's Disc and elsewhere. gos_faces : The little faces that pop up when people are talking. BTW, if I were a mecha, I would sleep with Musashi's Land Cruiser . Apologies to Monkey for raping his bandwidh, again. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Mon Apr 18, 2005 9:40 am er...thanks, I've been looking for some GOS pic's like this for a while...are any missing?

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Mon Apr 18, 2005 9:44 am How come gos_215~265 is named gos_242~265.zip? ;) /edit Ok, now I read your whole post Now I feel stupid... why do I make myself an ass on this board, and nowhere else?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 18, 2005 10:00 am anatrok wrote: er...thanks, I've been looking for some GOS pic's like this for a while...are any missing?

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Mon Apr 18, 2005 10:03 am Oh alright, so now I have to feel stupid about believing I did a misstake when I didn't :? By the way, I like Asuka's breasts in picture 029.jpg, for some reason... maybe I feel sorry for myself, I always think girls looks prettier when I feel sorry for myself...

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Apr 18, 2005 10:16 am I could never undestand the draw of this game, or GoS2.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 18, 2005 10:27 am DatDude wrote: I could never undestand the draw of this game, or GoS2.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Apr 18, 2005 1:49 pm I'm trying to not start a riot among the fools that think " mana " is an offical character and fits well into eva's story.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon Apr 18, 2005 2:55 pm DatDude wrote: I'm trying to not start a riot among the fools that think " mana " is an offical character and fits well into eva's story.

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Mon Apr 18, 2005 5:12 pm Oh, I like it cuz it's just give's Shinji a break....can't say I like Mana though...

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Apr 18, 2005 10:50 pm Really, with the amount of hate Mana is treated to, I was expecting the devil incarnate. Do you think anyone less annoying could possibly fall for Shinji so expressively? (Don't answer that. Please, for the love of Sammael, it's not that interesting.)

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Apr 18, 2005 10:53 pm She's a merry sue character pasted into an anime with darkly human characters in it. She sticks out like a nun on a whore house. And by that I mean a REAL nun not some whore dressed up as a nun.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Apr 19, 2005 3:28 pm DatDude wrote: She's a merry sue character pasted into an anime with darkly human characters in it. She sticks out like a nun on a whore house. And by that I mean a REAL nun not some whore dressed up as a nun.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Apr 19, 2005 3:42 pm Nerver mind about nunneries - based on previous episodes I'm suprised Shinji doesn't run off to become a monk (or expire with a terminal nosebleed) if she ends up flashing her norks at him.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 19, 2005 4:05 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Nerver mind about nunneries - based on previous episodes I'm suprised Shinji doesn't run off to become a monk (or expire with a terminal nosebleed) if she ends up flashing her norks at him.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Apr 19, 2005 4:52 pm Reichu wrote: "If"? Just download the 'endings.zip' and see them norks for yourself. It's okay -- we all know you're a Dirty Old Man. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Fri Apr 22, 2005 1:00 am Mana was named consistently with the rest of the Eva cast (Kirishima was also a sunken WWII ship), Ikuto Yamashita designed the mecha (he's done very little since), and they really put a lot of effort into the game. Mana didn't just fall in love with Shinji-- she was pretending to like him to get access to NERV. Mana and other characters since are really indicators of how badly Eva continues to frustrate us, even to this day. As much as we admire its originality and uncompromising attitude, many fans just can't give up the wish, even a little, that Shinji gets a happy ending. With a girl. That doesn't involve the end of the world and Kimochi Warui.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 22, 2005 9:16 am Aw sheet ... Just realized I screwed up compositing one of the GOS images. For anyone who downloaded the ZIPs, here's a replacement: http://evamonkey.com/reichu/misc/gos_208.jpg Otaprince wrote: Ikuto Yamashita designed the mecha (he's done very little since)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Apr 22, 2005 2:10 pm Otaprince wrote: As much as we admire its originality and uncompromising attitude, many fans just can't give up the wish, even a little, that Shinji gets a happy ending. With a girl. That doesn't involve the end of the world and Kimochi Warui.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 22, 2005 2:28 pm Considering Asuka has reembodied, her libido seems to have her destrudo conquered -- for now.
